name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for IRL Engine
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Include API shape, config options, or behavioral changes if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives did you explore? Why is this approach better?

## Regulatory / compliance context

If this feature is driven by a compliance requirement (MiFID II, EU AI Act, SEC 15c3-5, DORA, etc.), describe the mapping.

## Additional context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
